mapper.update: UPDATE t_exchange_order SET cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}, shareholder_id = #{shareholderId}, market = #{market}, security_id = #{securityId}, side = #{side,typeHandler=com.example.trading.common.typehandler.SideEnumTypeHandler}, qty = #{qty}, price = #{price}, status = #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumOrdinalTypeHandler}, create_time = #{createTime}, version = version + 1 -- 版本号自增 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} -- 乐观锁条件
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM t_exchange_order WHERE cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}
